params.name: The 4th Wall
params.description: I am the Mecha T9 Traveler. But lately... this world feels off. Every day, a can materializes on the ground, as if spawned from nothing. Pig droppings and fruits appear out of air. There're gaps in my memory I can’t explain. I wake to the same scene: a monkey and a shrine. The other Travelers don’t notice. Am I malfunctioning? Or... is this world not what it seems?
